name: Marcy Kaptur for Congress
subject: We need to investigate Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress P
body:
| | | Dear Friend,
President Trump, Mitch McConnell, and their friends in the media want the American people to believe in a false choice. They want the American people to think that patriots must make a decision between investigating potential criminal behavior on the part of President Trump and his associates, and making progress on the issues that improve the lives of working men and women.
Nothing could be further from the truth. [You can help me keep the light of truth on this scheme.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/BgE/ni0YAA/t.2t4/P5E01C-IQ1yRZkbgBLVmrw/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKtW2rCKMvObXtni6VNfSXuN-2FrkaY8gCSyWDOMMFOfRcbb4LD2WBA7oZdFxDJNGBVyJ-2FvAMXhJzfiR-2FUDWV4QZbouzI0Thk7nn-2FbnU4b8kPXyZH046q7aBguxGutkttY1-2B7eQsC9ueWaO-2FFZMvQ2JwV3qgLD604ZK-2FUCKpBTXd9cShVdG6vw580QvUA2R0cfZwNWfLb5Ig-2BCqG-2Fq63k-2FztA0WmcfrLTdHhwlgo6iB5z-2FSoAoztI6hmiUgtDoZv9AXw-3D/JVQp)
Since gaining control of the House of Representatives, Democrats have been hard at work. We've passed a bill to protect and expand access to the ballot box in the face of a new wave of voter suppression. We've passed a bill to protect those with pre-existing conditions, even as the Trump administration argues in court that hard-earned health care protections should be thrown out entirely - without a replacement. We've passed a bill to strengthen background checks on firearms purchases. And we voted to restore funding critical to improving water quality.
We continue to work on common-sense legislation that the American people strongly support. But, we wait for Mitch McConnell to join us as we look for bipartisan common sense solutions.
When Republicans aren't stonewalling needed legislation, they’re stonewalling legitimate oversight into Russian hacking and election interference in the 2016 presidential election. President Trump welcomed help from shady individuals with deep Russian connections. We now have Special Counsel Mueller's report detailing the president's sustained, extensive attempts to derail investigation into that interference.
We must protect the rule of law in this country - no one should be above the law. A full congressional inquiry into the president and his corrupt friends is of the utmost importance.
My campaigns and service in Congress have always been about serving people, not powerful corporations or foreign interests. To help amplify my voice in Washington, I need your help. [Please consider a small donation to deliver the message that we can do both](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/BgE/ni0YAA/t.2t4/P5E01C-IQ1yRZkbgBLVmrw/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKtW2rCKMvObXtni6VNfSXuHyQzvKk7i18YUYZuhpWU6CNg-2FsfIWd6AHVvIza6LnSjQMeSQk5rN6zOKleyY7nvyp2uWOAnboy-2BQZtZInUKcD8R5dQs44NBbKPZ8e9RZLiJWMQsjVdCcArnsbMLa9rEXYLV4G64qy6kMmm1KSsoxrAvsS8l16ibPd2H1XQbu-2BZKxJBS5F3uHpWmupGQB3WZq4Jhe8qTVunM7rzwOJjHq2-2BbGeTyGQ-2BZraqzpjUQKt2w-3D/u3jg): deliver policies that help working Americans and root out criminality at the highest levels of our government. Liberty depends on both.
Thank you,
Marcy

name: =?utf-8?q?Jen_O=E2=80=99Malley_Dillon=2C_Beto_for_America?=
subject: I’m sending these stories to Beto
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
#
The other day, Beto asked you to share your reasons for supporting this campaign, and I can’t begin to thank you enough for what you’ve written. I’ve honestly lost count of how many I’ve saved and shared with the team.
And that’s important, because campaigns are tough. Real tough. Especially when trying to keep up with _Beto_. He’s driven more than 7,500 miles to meet with thousands of voters in 150 towns across 20 states without skipping a beat. But the stories we hear on the road and the ones you shared the other day are what make it all worth it. They fuel us when we’re tired and remind us why we’re fighting so hard to win this thing.
[Below, I’m going to share a few of those stories with you. And if you find them as inspiring as I did — or if you’re already standing with Beto — I hope you’ll make a $3 donation to our campaign today.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18073?refcode=ema20190708-41250&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=41250%2E444211%2EC2KF5O)
I love this one from Julie in Detroit. Beto could just spend his days on the phone begging for donations, but instead, he’s traveling all over the country to speak with people face-fo-face.
> _I’ve been following since the Senate campaign and I truly love and appreciate the positivity and passion with which everyone on Team Beto operates. From speaking truth to power at the border to backing up women’s reproductive rights and most importantly the desire to go everywhere and speak to and WITH everyone. Keep doing what you’re doing to change our country and the world! You’ve inspired me and so many others to get more informed and more involved._
Or this one from Doris in Chicago. We’re honored to have your support, Doris, and can’t wait to keep building this campaign together.
> _In my 36yrs I have never donated/volunteered for anyone, but your compassion, your welcoming of everyone (even those who oppose you or the party), and your strength to fight the good fight has motivated me to donate more than once. I seriously have lost count. I am proud of you and proud to support you. Keep strong Beto. You’re a good man. Thank you for running for President and I can’t wait to see you and your family walk into the White House._
Or this one from Nick in Corvallis, Oregon. I see the same exact thing that you do, Nick. It’s one of the reasons why I moved halfway across the country to join this campaign.
> _Beto's campaign gives me hope. He cares about the ordinary Americans--the downtrodden Americans, the hopeless Americans--everyone. It isn't just a political calculation for him. He seems determined to invoke change wherever he goes and wherever he speaks. Oregon and the western states could use that kind of inspiration and change._
Lastly, this story from Allison in Houston. All of us need to come together if we’re going to end this cruel and inhumane crisis at the border. And knowing that so many people are organizing in their own communities to help achieve that goal is truly inspiring.
> _I supported Beto in his 2018 Senate run in Texas. I canvassed, knocked doors, attended town halls, drove voters to the polls throughout early voting and on election day. On the evening of the election I drove a U of Houston student from the main campus all the way to the Woodlands so we would get that one last vote. I was heartbroken at the result but energized by the community and support that Beto had inspired in Texas (and beyond). I know how hard it is to show up enthusiastically at events and to travel constantly. Beto has shown his heart and dedication and it inspires me to support his campaign. Right now I am donating not only to support his campaign, I am donating to bring light onto the tragedies at the border and at detention camps. Please keep this issue at the forefront and work with other candidates and elected officials to change the treatment and policies. We are all out here protesting and writing letters to our elected officials. We appreciate you working to help us get this fixed. Thank you._
These are barely a _fraction_ of the 1,000+ stories we received so far. And we’re still making our way through the list. But I wanted to thank you — all of you — for everything you’ve done and will continue to do. We have a long road ahead of us, and your continued support is what keeps us more energized than ever.
Gratefully,
Jen O'Malley Dillon
Campaign Manager
Beto for America
P.S. If you missed Beto’s email last week, [you can share your own story here.](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/share-your-story/?source=ema20190707&t=2&akid=41250%2E444211%2EC2KF5O) We’ll read each and every one.
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18073?refcode=ema20190708-41250&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=41250%2E444211%2EC2KF5O)**

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=22&akid=41250%2E444211%2EC2KF5O). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

body:
"President Trump struck a patriotic, nonpartisan and unifying note during his address at Fourth of July celebrations in Washington..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3a98d83786&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **President Trump Defies Ominous Predictions with Nonpartisan July 4th Salute to American Spirit**

“President Trump struck a patriotic, nonpartisan and unifying note during his address at Fourth of July celebrations in Washington, D.C.,” Lukas Mikelionis reports for Fox News. “A massive crowd gathered on the Lincoln Memorial despite the rain”—an audience that filled both sides along the Reflecting Pool and stretched out to the Washington Monument.

“The president used the speech to call on Americans to ‘stay true to our cause’ and praised American heroes including the Armed Forces and civil rights leaders.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b3fba77809&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Payroll growth rebounded sharply in June as the U.S. economy added 224,000 jobs, the best gain since January,” Jeff Cox reports for [CNBC](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ac295d553d&e=3ee4985eea). The economy beat expectations once again as experts predicted job growth of only 165,000. The unemployment rate of 3.7 percent remains at “near 50-year lows.”
---
|
---
| President Trump’s 4th of July address took the tradition “to new heights on Thursday. Democrats complained before the speech that Trump was politicizing the Fourth of July. body:
I want to make sure you saw my most recent OpEd in the Wall Street Journal [ ](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=ce3f09b38a424b179c5fe275e2052e9f&_e=3W7xg80-zmYnF3tdpShePt89zD7VePWlb9CdEQAw-nYhpeO0UdRrVrIHZyMX17mpiyJFCsNCi05fTRxW6JPNPoUdfzgl94ZoL0Qbe1wt8GzrcEqQ73bS4fNbqMoMrnsF6jxO4TG2yH8JaU9lDnh52HQxWK4N4L1qAVkB6QPR8m2CAqgPbqXD4n_wPhpYExaHGbNNPsbqxYxmEoPtonnyGuVWH5z0RhrboInRvYWWNn6JMfhYRkazJs-8AGe-ulyaWbDptsG5Iuf7HWEubysl5Q%3D%3D) Hello Everyone,
I want to make sure you saw my most recent OpEd in the Wall Street Journal, "Conservatives, Put Culture First," where I discuss a topic that has the power to alter our nation as we know it: the role of government influence on our culture. [ ](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=ce3f09b38a424b179c5fe275e2052e9f&_e=3W7xg80-zmYnF3tdpShePm52OQNg9d7lF29uPCJt6W4wqIe_LV5SKQDJLaBrGfqyKhiagc2Ki6-AgAgBStSO__8WryjJq-044Zd0a2w3TAcpinKNngQuMfyNmrjiddJMq5nvNeQDXpAvX_yjTGhFGonhFUcU9-WQDkrLUd7_uJcYQ7peFtU3lick6Hp1meXOIXdpDHSTLy3u_obgdTsvszKc8rfFq8B9mciYt4WlEUm0he2SQV7x6ELaZ2RAhgEoNL0s7OnEm_RLj3jqmnjBGxWwbRi0g64ZubCOl_DYXZ9eJDlDYEYcHUT2klh0Pe9tXWwaqqP8hU9WvBVycb9WrI6Ubw8oy4qnYVeqI-KziLh1Ou6zv-h07AnSyyZc5zjC) [ Read the full article here ](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=ce3f09b38a424b179c5fe275e2052e9f&_e=3W7xg80-zmYnF3tdpShePm52OQNg9d7lF29uPCJt6W6TUMIzlTes1hJvf5XoKQM8vNlXGiG23kdwlUTOh6wtfcDVkOcnvBi2MMxovpCTbyB9bhTrS6rFYiIZ5jkGX9FrjEI2XTmu8aiynA2PhinPRhKa_dlwKnWneHp4w-Ngjh3bjGK0ejBlB47VCShVfuFLRYnqw8lnxpBJyRf-QeXR1fzvFGVJvsO9oUbck2tfaUwvORItEf1K3LVjJ-CbWeVB9_P7Sf9npi0JXyY801Fz83KFr24FHPSQno03uybKwMa8SyKITcaimcpNj8Hkd_EZPN6g8rzqt04dUocO4OTJqQ%3D%3D) It's no secret that liberals hyperbolize and shock the public with doomsday threats that only they can solve (with radical policy changes of course). As I write in my article, modern liberals resent society’s distrust of big government, and to circumvent that they constantly declare new existential crises to justify massive federal responses. Many Conservatives, in their haste to preserve the culture of our nation, are abandoning our free-market principles and rushing to government solutions as well. They embrace Mr. Trump’s tariffs over free trade, hoping he can save their jobs. They wonder if cutting taxes is sufficient, given the liberal assault on religious freedoms and traditional values. They resent the “Republican elite” for focusing solely on economic prosperity. In short, they run the risk of falling into the same trap that so many on the left have: **_assuming that more government can turn our nation’s culture around._** The lesson here is plain, although not necessarily easy to swallow. Render unto Caesar only the things that are Caesar’s. Preserve and respect the traditional role of private initiative, charities, churches and civic organizations, and _**allow culture to once again determine our society’s success.**_ If you want to read more, [click here](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=ce3f09b38a424b179c5fe275e2052e9f&_e=3W7xg80-zmYnF3tdpShePm52OQNg9d7lF29uPCJt6W6TUMIzlTes1hJvf5XoKQM8vNlXGiG23kdwlUTOh6wtfcDVkOcnvBi2MMxovpCTbyB9bhTrS6rFYiIZ5jkGX9Friswzwqjugistbmv1sOgBKXs0tqwi6I0rSk1c8kCEIlbELtExTmy7AJAHBK1ClJi08gRDERuVAZqmXDRsIIcE5iX_Jg_aMo1AmqtCyqghBO_f5wIXo48gSCFV3r6GqmFOXk9_umJeKdeP36Rd3grHGENeUxfLr7gQUhg38YFEhOkar4c2ypDTHV6NNkCuSc3T7V72nm1Aq34WpIox81Ju8Q%3D%3D). [ Read the full article here ](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=ce3f09b38a424b179c5fe275e2052e9f&_e=3W7xg80-zmYnF3tdpShePm52OQNg9d7lF29uPCJt6W6TUMIzlTes1hJvf5XoKQM8vNlXGiG23kdwlUTOh6wtfcDVkOcnvBi2MMxovpCTbyB9bhTrS6rFYiIZ5jkGX9FrHZ0I-NApwj1DL_gj_xAo80K65-h0pm7JhHDLq5lIhgxUrMfPHccDdZAE8gvFNNMKgsuikbl1q9iKaUg6eB0JI1pwLoRKe81bIEmVxQeosjqj5dQY32zUjstrXatu3tLPXKfBjitzbTisGltV-Ia33RYsBH8f3VJFbPnDRwHBOgsj1B4ZuzlC2viWqX1Td9N5ccwZOJjdht0ASmD1yVVAkA%3D%3D) Sincerely,

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: The homework gap
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Peter,

I've emailed you before about the broadband divide, but I wanted to tell you a little bit more about why it's so critical.

Students across the country rely on the internet for a variety of reasons, whether that's using online resources to research more about a given subject, communicating with teachers or peers, or simply submitting homework assignments electronically.

But the unfortunate truth is that many students in Central Virginia don't have access to the internet and are put behind their peers in urban and suburban areas. [**In seven of the ten counties that make up Virginia 's Seventh District, there are substantial areas with little to no broadband access.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/JdG7zCy4OxLxwqV2eC3h15sJRreP_hu8V8u6CvCSd5g=/ZMwZiq2bmyqUj5wGPZFL-1lDRV8guw6b-QmSzSF2CAM=?ref=BLU-SPAN-20190708-1-EM&recurring=true)

A 2017 Congressional report estimates some 12 million school-aged children suffer from this lack of access and thus, "the homework gap".

But each day I'm fighting for greater broadband access for all of Central Virginia. Greater access will mean more jobs and a brighter future for our children.

[_**If you agree, then help me continue the fight. Take a moment and help support my campaign.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/JdG7zCy4OxLxwqV2eC3h15sJRreP_hu8V8u6CvCSd5g=/UcqAvFvzilOKnT5B4cZt6IBrKAaIPdExXWHf5sz7VBU=?ref=BLU-SPAN-20190708-1-EM&recurring=true)

I'm working each day to ensure a better future for you, and for our children in Central Virginia.

Thanks for all that you do.

_\- Abigail_ | | | [ DONATE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/JdG7zCy4OxLxwqV2eC3h15sJRreP_hu8V8u6CvCSd5g=/ZMwZiq2bmyqUj5wGPZFL-1lDRV8guw6b-QmSzSF2CAM=?ref=BLU-SPAN-20190708-1-EM&recurring=true)

name: Tim Kaine
subject: A must-win race in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek,

If Democrats want to take back the Senate in 2020, **we have to re-elect Virginia Senator Mark Warner.**

But Mark has just been challenged by Scott Taylor, a former Republican congressman who voted with Donald Trump 98 percent of the time. What's more, Taylor has been backed by the deep-pocketed Koch brothers.

**That makes this race a must-win.** If we're going to keep Mark in the Senate -- where he's been fighting to investigate foreign interference in our elections, protect our health care, and ensure an economy that works for everyone -- we all need to step up right now.

[**Will you make a donation to Mark 's campaign to help us hold on to his seat and keep Virginia blue?**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1779/3e0906/78bbd545/3e3091b0/1973816944/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-warner-2020&source=20190708_1_FR_TK_Warner&amount=30&refcode=20190708_1_FR_TK_Warner?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+make+a+donation+to+Markrsquos+c&utm_campaign=20190708_1_FR_TK_Warner&source=20190708_1_FR_TK_Warner") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1779/3e0906/78bbd545/3e3091b7/1973816944/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-warner-2020?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20190708_1_FR_TK_Warner_5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20190708_1_FR_TK_Warner&source=20190708_1_FR_TK_Warner")

| [**DONATE $100**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1779/3e0906/78bbd545/3e3091b5/1973816944/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-warner-2020?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20190708_1_FR_TK_Warner_100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=20190708_1_FR_TK_Warner&source=20190708_1_FR_TK_Warner")

| [**OTHER**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1779/3e0906/78bbd545/3e3091b4/1973816944/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-warner-2020?refcode=20190708_1_FR_TK_Warner_other&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+OTHER&utm_campaign=20190708_1_FR_TK_Warner&source=20190708_1_FR_TK_Warner")
---
In his 2014 election, Mark won his race by _less than one percent_. **We can 't take any chances in 2020 -- control of the Senate is far too important.**

If Scott Taylor wins, he'll work to push through even more unqualified judges and support Trump's efforts to repeal the Affordable Care Act. But if we re-elect Mark and flip the Senate, we'll have an important check on the Trump administration's corruption and be able to advance policies that actually help people -- like improved access to health care and protections for workers in the gig economy.

This race couldn't be more important to the future of Virginia and the United States. **It 's on Mark, and all of us supporting him, to take back the Senate and hold Trump and Republicans accountable.** [**So I 'm asking: Will you make a donation to Mark's campaign to help keep Virginia blue?**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1779/3e0906/78bbd545/3e30918b/1973816944/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-warner-2020&source=20190708_1_FR_TK_Warner&amount=30&refcode=20190708_1_FR_TK_Warner?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+So+Irsquom+asking+Will+you+make+a+donati&utm_campaign=20190708_1_FR_TK_Warner&source=20190708_1_FR_TK_Warner")

Thanks,

Tim Kaine

name: Wilmot Collins
subject: Unequal. Unfair. Wrong.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
#
Friend,
America had a great victory yesterday. The U.S. Women's National Soccer team won their fourth World Cup title and proud Americans in Montana and all over the country cheered for our wonderful team.
But friend, we still have a big problem.
The U.S. Women's National Soccer team earns lower wages than the men's team. This is wrong. Wage inequality is wrong on the soccer field and it is wrong in any workplace in America.
We must fight to raise wages and close the gender pay gap all across this country--for women, people of color, and those struggling with student debt. For everyone.
**[As your next United States Senator I will fight wage inequality and the wealth gap in every form. I will fight to raise the wage to a living wage for ALL Americans. Add your name now if you're with me.](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164743/1e3760f0/69d66b23/5f7ea2a9/3209943637/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fight-wage-inequality?source=em190708&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=")**
**[SIGN THE PETITION](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164743/1e3760f0/69d66b23/5f7ea2a9/3209943637/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fight-wage-inequality?source=em190708&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=")**
We must stand together as Americans and say no more to the 1% who works to divide us so they can prosper off our backs. As a proud MFPE union member, I will walk picket lines and always fight for my union brothers and sisters. As Montana's next Senator, I will fight against unfair wages, wealth inequality, and predatory corporations.
Steve Daines stands against me on these and many other issues. He cares more about giving himself, his wealthy friends, and big corporations a tax cut than fighting for Montana's hardworking families. It's time to elect a Senator who will stand with working Montanans, not wealthy billionaires like the Koch Brothers.
**[We need a Senator who will fight the pay gap and guarantee every worker in America earns a living wage. Sign the petition now if you agree.](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164743/1e3760f0/69d66b23/5f7ea2a9/3209943637/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fight-wage-inequality?source=em190708&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=")**
Thank you,
Wilmot Collins

Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Tina Smith
subject: The Trump administration is trying to dismantle health care -- will you stand up and fight?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We must fight every second.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-pet-july?refcode=rtw_20190708_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend,

Tomorrow, oral arguments begin in _Texas v. United States_ \-- a case which could invalidate the entire Affordable Care Act.

**Let 's be completely clear here: the Trump administration is arguing for the court to issue a ruling that would result in millions of people with pre-existing conditions losing the health care protections they depend on.**

I won't sit back and let that happen -- and you can't either.

**[If you're willing to fight for the people across the country who are relying on the Affordable Care Act and its protections, then add your name here. We must show the Trump administration and the country that we will not stop fighting for our health care.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4f933/c1f7015/65c67e87/114681e6/1288604140/VEsE/ "https://tinasmith.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fight-for-our-healthcare?source=rtw_20190708_em-full")** **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4f933/c1f7015/65c67e87/114681e6/1288604140/VEsF/ "https://tinasmith.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fight-for-our-healthcare?source=rtw_20190708_em-full")** I believe it's worth both acknowledging the real danger we face and who is leading this charge.

Special interest groups and conservative leaders want us to be distracted in this moment. They have seen the grassroots strength behind protecting health care, and believe that now is their time to act.

And it's clear they will not stop until they dismantle our health care. That means lack of protection for people with pre-existing conditions, millions losing care, and possible loss of Medicaid expansion in states across the country.

We must meet these conservative attacks with determination and strength. **We have won this fight before because of people like you standing up and saying ENOUGH. Let 's do it again.**

**[Add your name here before oral arguments begin in _Texas v. United States_ and pledge that you will not stop fighting for our health care.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4f933/c1f7015/65c67e87/114681e6/1288604140/VEsC/ "https://tinasmith.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fight-for-our-healthcare?source=rtw_20190708_em-full")**

Thank you for digging deep and doing everything you can one more time.

Tina | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota. name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: I just need your signature
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
Can I count on you to add your name before midnight and show your support for my campaign? So many underestimated us, but we just showed the world what a real grassroots movement looks like | | |
---
| |
---
| | **BREAKING: Juli an Castro makes history to meet the donor threshold for the next Presidential Debates. ** [_**Sign on to show your support for this historic campaign for President >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce63/3eb3e2fc/58030058/744abb2b/1928837915/VEsH/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/julian-priorities-survey?source=20190708_em_pet_b1_castro_all_rs") | Hours ago, I became one of the few candidates to officially meet the donor qualifications for the next Presidential debates.
I know many folks underestimated us, but you helped me prove them all wrong.
_[**Will you add your name to show your support for our historic movement? >>**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce63/3eb3e2fc/58030058/744abb2b/1928837915/VEsE/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/julian-priorities-survey?source=20190708_em_pet_b1_castro_all_rs")_
---

I was never supposed to be a frontrunner in this presidential race.

I was never supposed to make the cut for the debate stage.

People who grew up where I did -- who were raised by single moms like I was -- who come from a family of immigrants like I do -- we were told to set our sights lower.

But you just helped me make history and prove them all wrong.

Because I just became one of the handful of candidates to reach the 130,000-donor requirement for the next Presidential Debates.

[_**I'm asking you to add your name to show your support and help me prove that we're in this for the long haul. >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce63/3eb3e2fc/58030058/744abb2b/1928837915/VEsF/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/julian-priorities-survey?source=20190708_em_pet_b1_castro_all_rs")

Serving in President Obama's cabinet was one of the greatest honors of my life.

We fought for justice. We worked to improve lives. We strived to make this a country where people could live with dignity.

But watching Trump rip our progress to shreds has been the most infuriating spectacle I've ever witnessed.

I can't wait to get onto that debate stage and defend President Obama and the progress we made -- and it's all because of you.

So I'm humbly asking: [_**Can I count on you to add your name before midnight and show your support for my campaign? So many underestimated us, but we just showed the world what a real grassroots movement looks like. >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce63/3eb3e2fc/58030058/744abb2b/1928837915/VEsC/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/julian-priorities-survey?source=20190708_em_pet_b1_castro_all_rs")

When the establishment said I was a longshot...

When the press didn't give me a fair shot...

When the far right said no one like me could ever be President...

You believed in me, and you had my back. You have no idea how much that means.

Thank you for believing that a kid from the West Side of San Antonio could get to the Democratic debate stage and share my vision with America.

[_**Thank you for giving me the opportunity to tell my story and earn your trust. And if you're still reading this, I hope I 've also earned your signature. So I'm humbly asking one last time: **_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce63/3eb3e2fc/58030058/744abb2b/1928837915/VEsD/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/julian-priorities-survey?source=20190708_em_pet_b1_castro_all_rs")[_**Will you sign your name before midnight? >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce63/3eb3e2fc/58030058/744abb2a/1928837915/VEsA/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/julian-priorities-survey?source=20190505_em_pet_b1_castro_all")

Thank you,

Julian

| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce63/3eb3e2fc/58030058/744abb29/1928837915/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro")

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the first debates and send him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must reach 130,000 donors this summer to secure his spot on the Democratic debate stage.

Julian hasn't qualified yet, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money. Will you help him get there?

| | | These past few months have been an exciting whirlwind, but tomorrow is when all of our hard work pays off. **Tomorrow is Election Day!**

As I think about tomorrow evening, I am filled with gratitude. I have met incredible people all over our district and have watched them take time from their own busy schedules to encourage friends, neighbors, and family members to support my campaign. No words can describe how thankful I am.

Yet, early voter turnout has been strong in my opponent's territory, and our internal polling shows a tied race. We need to rally our supporters and make sure each one makes it to the polls.**We need every vote!**

I’m asking you for one more favor: please text, call, and message your loved ones and remind them that tomorrow is Election Day. This election comes down to ONE THING -- will our supporters vote on Tuesday, July 9th?

If you’re looking for a representative in Congress who is 100% committed to:
* Supporting President Trump’s conservative agenda, including border security
* Fighting for lower taxes
* Fixing the broken health care system
* Putting Eastern North Carolina values ahead of DC insiders
* Protecting the 2nd Amendment
* Standing up for the sanctity of life

Then VOTE for conservative outsider Dr. Joan Perry on Tuesday, July 9th**!

The polls are open from 6:30am to 7:30pm.** As long as you are in line by 7:30pm, you can vote.

It's a busy time of the year and you have many priorities vying for your attention, but can I count on you to vote and encourage your friends to join you? We expect this race to be won by hundreds of votes -- you could make the difference.

After you vote and contact your friends, join me at the Laughing Owl in Kinston (not Goldsboro) to celebrate!

Thanks so much,

body:
This Fourth of July, President Donald J. Trump stood just below the Lincoln Memorial steps and delivered an Independence Day address to... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bfba4e7998&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • July 8, 2019
---
| | |
# **See the highlights from President Trump’s ‘Salute to America’**

**This Fourth of July** , President Donald J. Trump stood just below the Lincoln Memorial steps and delivered an Independence Day address to a crowd stretching across the National Mall and all the way to the Washington Monument.

**“Today,** we come together as one nation with this very special Salute to America. We celebrate our history, our people, and the heroes who proudly defend our flag—the brave men and women of the United States Military,” President Trump said.

**“Together, we are part** of one of the greatest stories ever told: the story of America.”

**Watch:** [The best moments from President Trump’s “Salute to America”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ab098018a8&e=3ee4985eea)

**From our Founding Fathers** to modern-day heroes, that story is comprised of Americans who have made sacrifices large and small for this nation. Seated just behind President Trump on Thursday were some of these individuals—many of whom the President recognized during his speech.

**Dr. Emil Freireich,** for example, pioneered treatments for leukemia. Before his work, 99 percent of children diagnosed with that terrible disease died. Today, 90 percent of kids with the most common forms of leukemia will survive, thanks largely to Dr. Freireich’s medical breakthroughs.

**“That same American** spirit that emboldened our founders has kept us strong throughout our history,” President Trump said. “It lives on in each and every one of you here today.”

**At its heart** , “Salute to America” showcased the revived strength and vigor of our armed forces. Each of the five military branches featured flyovers along the National Mall, and the event concluded with an incredible run by the famed U.S. Navy Blue Angels.

**“Nearly 250 years ago,** a volunteer army of farmers and shopkeepers, blacksmiths, merchants, and militiamen risked life and limb to secure American liberty and self-government,” the President said. “This evening, we have witnessed the noble might of the warriors who continue that legacy.”

[President Trump: “The future belongs to the brave, the strong, the proud, and the free.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f5068211a6&e=3ee4985eea)

**Marc Thiessen:** [Trump made his critics look small during his ‘Salute to America’](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=94a9f5701e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **The Trump Economy shatters expectations . . . again.**

**Just one day** after Salute to America, last week’s jobs report delivered more great news on America’s comeback under President Trump. Yet again, the U.S. economy beat “expert” predictions—proving that pro-growth policies are delivering for American workers.

**Job creation** remains strong, with the 224,000 jobs added in June far surpassing the 162,000 predicted. Just as important, families are seeing an uptick in wages, with an increase of 3.1 percent over the past year, according to the Labor Department.

**The** **nation’s unemployment** rate is near 50-year lows. The latest 3.7 percent mark makes for 16 consecutive months with unemployment at or below 4 percent.

**Despite** **the critics’** negative predictions, America’s economic outlook remains rock solid. Since President Trump was elected in 2016, more than 6 million jobs have been added, and that number continues to rise as more and more Americans join the labor force.

[Behind the numbers: The latest great jobs report in the Trump Economy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ab33f1126a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
